footer.tagline: Real food. Fast service. No compromise.

home.subtitle: Maczanka, Knysza and homemade comfort food from Mike’s kitchen.

menu.title: Choose your Polish food
menu.subtitle: Fresh dishes made to order and selected items available from stock.

about.title: About Mike’s Food
about.subtitle: Real food. No compromises.
about.whoText: Mike’s Food is a modern street kitchen focused on fast service, quality ingredients, and honest prices.
about.freshText: We cook everything fresh. No shortcuts.
about.fastText: You get your food quickly without losing quality.
about.simpleText: Only what really works. No unnecessary items.
about.tasteText: Street food energy with restaurant quality.
about.finalTitle: Built for people who value good food
about.finalText: No waiting. No overpricing. Just good food done right.

booking.title: Booking
booking.subtitle: Book a table, catering or Mike’s Food Truck and we’ll confirm your request as soon as possible.
booking.name: Full name
booking.successText: We received your booking request and will contact you shortly.
booking.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

mikes.title: Book our food truck for your event
mikes.subtitle: Bring Mike's Food to your party, company event, festival, private celebration or special occasion.
mikes.privateText: Perfect for birthdays, parties, weddings and private celebrations.
mikes.businessText: Serve your team, guests or clients with fresh food on location.
mikes.festivalsText: A strong street food setup for markets, festivals and outdoor events.
mikes.ctaText: Send us your date, location and expected number of guests — we’ll get back to you with the best option.

catering.title: Food for events, teams and celebrations
catering.subtitle: Fresh food for private parties, business lunches, company events, festivals and larger groups.
catering.smallText: Perfect for birthdays, family gatherings and private occasions.
catering.companyText: Lunches, team events, office food and business meetings.
catering.largeText: Food solutions for bigger groups, festivals and outdoor events.
catering.provideGroups: Food for small and large groups
catering.ctaText: Tell us the date, location and number of guests — we’ll help you find the best food setup.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Questions, bookings, catering or events — contact Nordic Eatery and we’ll get back to you.
contact.supportText: For order issues, complaints, refunds or payment questions, contact us by email or phone. We handle all customer requests as quickly as possible.
contact.ctaText: Use the booking page to send us your date, time, location and number of guests.

support.title: Need help?
support.subtitle: If you have questions about your order, booking or catering — we are here to help.
support.a1: Usually between 30–40 minutes depending on demand.
support.q2: Can I book the food truck?
support.a2: Yes, go to the Mike’s page or Booking page and send a request.
support.a3: Yes, we provide catering for events, companies and private groups.
support.a4: You can email us directly or use the Contact page.
support.ctaText: Contact us directly and we’ll respond as quickly as possible.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: These terms apply to all orders made through Nordic Eatery.
terms.orderingText: Customers can place orders through our website. All orders are subject to product availability and confirmation.
terms.pricesText: All prices are shown in SEK and include applicable taxes. The final order total is shown before payment.
terms.paymentText: We accept card payments, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Swish and cash when available. Card payments are processed securely through Stripe. Swish payments are processed through Swish.
terms.deliveryText: Orders can be delivered or picked up depending on availability. Delivery times are estimates and may vary depending on demand, weather and distance.
terms.cancellationText: Orders can be cancelled before preparation has started. Once food preparation has started, cancellation may not be possible.
terms.refundsText: If there is a problem with your order, contact us as soon as possible. Refunds may be issued for incorrect, missing or failed orders after review.
terms.contactText: For questions, complaints, refunds or payment issues, contact us at kontakt@nordiceatery.se or by phone.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: We respect your privacy and handle your personal data responsibly.
privacy.dataText: When you place an order, we may collect your name, phone number, address, order details and payment status.
privacy.usageText: We use your data to process orders, deliver food, handle payments, provide customer support and improve our service.
privacy.paymentsText: Payments may be processed through Stripe and Swish. We do not store full card details on our website.
privacy.storageText: Order information may be stored securely in our systems for operational, accounting and support purposes.
privacy.rightsText: You may contact us to request access, correction or deletion of your personal data where legally possible.
privacy.contactText: For privacy questions, contact us at kontakt@nordiceatery.se.

products.title: Products
products.name: Name
products.subtitle: Subtitle
products.stockOn: Stock tracking is ON. This item will be hidden from the customer menu when stock is 0.
products.stockOff: Stock tracking is OFF. Use this for dishes prepared to order, like Maczanka or Knysza.
products.stockZero: Stock is 0. This product will be hidden from the customer menu.

kitchen.title: Orders board
kitchen.subtitle: Keep this page open on the kitchen tablet. New orders will appear here and can be moved through the kitchen workflow.
kitchen.emptyText: Demo orders from checkout will appear here.
